span.p: Revenue up but margin down - delivery driving volume

span.p: Is delivery P&L modeled separately from dine-in?

span.p: Build separate channel P&L - delivery may be loss-making on every order

span.p: Is channel contribution margin positive after commission and packaging?

span.p: Is delivery menu priced at a premium vs dine-in?

span.p: Add delivery price premium to offset commission - test 8 to 15 percent uplift

span.p: Negotiate platform commission rate or pause volume

span.p: Is delivery volume displacing dine-in capacity during peak?

span.p: Throttle delivery at peak - dine-in has higher contribution margin

span.p: Delivery is accretive off-peak - optimize packaging and mix to improve CM
